runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - stream/v2 timing header verification

expertAssessments.rationale: Production deployment dd64e7d15에서 guest flow 후 AI Chat summary query를 재검증한 결과, /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 경로로 정상 응답했고 UI에는 Streaming AI 배지와 15대 서버 요약이 노출되었습니다.

stream/v2 응답에서 x-ai-latency-ms=215, x-ai-mode=streaming, x-ai-source=cloud-run, x-ai-cache-status=BYPASS는 노출됐지만 server-timing은 여전히 null이었습니다. stream timing observability는 부분 개선됐지만 production header visibility gap이 남아 있습니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Vercel/Next response path에서 Server-Timing이 제거되는 지점을 추가 진단하고, QA 기준은 우선 X-AI-Latency-Ms를 SSOT로 사용

completedImprovements.title: AI Chat streaming route exposes X-AI timing headers on production
completedImprovements.evidence: stream/v2 response headers: x-ai-latency-ms=215, x-ai-mode=streaming, x-ai-source=cloud-run, x-ai-cache-status=BYPASS

completedImprovements.title: AI summary chat query uses streaming path on production
completedImprovements.evidence: AI Chat summary starter query used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and rendered Streaming AI badge with production summary response

notes: Deployment verified via Vercel MCP: dpl_4BXJMbrpaLiRnUDCEQSYkHvquFyt, commit dd64e7d15, READY/PROMOTED.
Browser fetch instrumentation on production captured /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 status=200, durationMs=2093.
Response content confirmed production summary: 전체 15대 정상 13대, 경고 1대, 비상 1대, 오프라인 0대 with api-was-dc1-01 / api-was-dc1-02 warning guidance.
UI showed Streaming AI badge and 일반 대화 응답 metadata for the summary query.
This run closes the missing X-AI header gap for Chat stream but keeps Server-Timing visibility as deferred.
